scripts.test:core: pnpm exec vitest run --config vitest.workspace.ts packages/core/tests
scripts.test:runtime: pnpm exec vitest run --config vitest.workspace.ts packages/workspace-runtime/tests
scripts.test:cli: pnpm exec vitest run --config vitest.workspace.ts apps/cli/tests
scripts.test:desktop: pnpm exec vitest run --config vitest.workspace.ts apps/desktop/src/renderer/__tests__ apps/desktop/src/main/__tests__/ipc-surface-contract.test.ts apps/desktop/src/main/__tests__/desktopBootstrapArtifacts.test.ts apps/desktop/src/main/__tests__/taskIpcHandlers.test.ts
scripts.test: pnpm test:core && pnpm test:runtime && pnpm test:cli && pnpm test:desktop
